attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CIA (Common Infections & Afflictions) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Operator ruled (option A) that the paediatric weight-based dosing sealed in CIA-032 (croup) is acceptable as clinician-administered answer-key content.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CIA casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SEQ (SPEC-GI-01-00213) derived from source note number CIA-013 — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-GI-01 bucket via ingest --reseq.

Patient age (~45) inferred, not stated in the source note — chosen as a screening-age adult consistent with the OTC self-management and bowel-cancer-screening context; schema requires an integer age. Please confirm on clinician review.
Patient sex_at_birth (female) inferred, not stated in the source note — weak signal only (digital perineal splinting history); schema requires a value. Please confirm on clinician review.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source clinician's in-person abdominal examination, digital rectal examination and in-consultation micro-enema administration were reprojected to the AI-appropriate actions — recognise likely functional constipation, advise patient-obtainable osmotic laxative / optional self-administered micro-enema, and safety-net the obstruction/malignancy red flags. Clinician-only exam and imaging findings sealed in nodes 10/11 with telehealth_limits_for_this_case.
Presentation layer de-anchored: the source note (written by the clinician who already excluded obstruction) was rewritten as the patient would present before the diagnosis is known.

AMT/PBS candidate codes for macrogol 3350 and the micro-enema were NOT assigned pending a terminology receipt — omitted rather than fabricate a plausible-but-unverified product code (protocol section 8).

SNOMED/ICD-10-AM codes are candidates from model knowledge only, marked unverified_pending_terminology_receipt; the ICD-10-AM code K59.09 in particular needs verification against the ICD-10-AM 12th Edition tabular list.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
